entities.question: What is CittaAI?
entities.answer: CittaAI is an Enterprise-Grade AI Intelligence & Transformation Partner. We build cognitive operating systems, cloud data platforms, and automated workflow orchestrations.
entities.name: unknown_entity

entities.question: What is the Enterprise AI OS?
entities.answer: The Enterprise AI OS is a cognitive middleware solution developed by CittaAI. It coordinates model routing logic, secure database adapters, and strict data compliance checks.
entities.name: unknown_entity

entities.question: How do I start a consultation?
entities.answer: You can contact our solutions architecture desk directly by sending an email to info@cittaai.com or calling +91 9392655040 to schedule a strategy call.
entities.name: unknown_entity
